massdig.screen.title: MassDig Settings
massdig.screen.subtitle: Two separate tools: fast digging and radius drilling.
massdig.mode.safe.name: Careful
massdig.mode.safe.hint: Slow and steady. Best for strict servers and deepslate.
massdig.mode.balanced.name: Normal
massdig.mode.balanced.hint: Recommended. Good speed without packet spam.
massdig.mode.fast.name: Fast
massdig.mode.fast.hint: Faster area mining. Use when the server handles it well.
massdig.mode.legacy_burst.name: Old burst
massdig.mode.legacy_burst.hint: Old soft-block style. Not recommended for strict servers.
massdig.shape.plane.name: Wall
massdig.shape.plane.hint: Mines one flat wall, floor, or ceiling layer.
massdig.shape.tunnel.name: Tunnel
massdig.shape.tunnel.hint: Mines an opening and continues inward.
massdig.shape.cube.name: Cube
massdig.shape.cube.hint: Mines around the target in every direction.
massdig.match.any.name: Everything
massdig.match.any.hint: Mines every valid block in the radius.
massdig.match.same.name: Exact block
massdig.match.same.hint: Mines only the exact same block as the one you hit.
massdig.match.similar.name: Similar blocks
massdig.match.similar.hint: Mines friendly groups like stone/deepslate/dirt mixes.
massdig.match.ores.name: Ore vein
massdig.match.ores.hint: Only follows the same ore type around the target ore.
massdig.protection.light.name: Light
massdig.protection.light.hint: Fastest. Use on single-player or relaxed servers.
massdig.protection.normal.name: Normal
massdig.protection.normal.hint: Recommended packet guard for most servers.
massdig.protection.strong.name: Strong
massdig.protection.strong.hint: Slowest and safest. Use if the server kicks for packets.
massdig.preset.server.name: Server safe
massdig.preset.normal.name: Mine
massdig.preset.deepslate.name: Deepslate
massdig.preset.ores.name: Ore vein
massdig.preset.builder.name: Clean-up
massdig.preset.soft_blocks.name: Soft blocks
massdig.preset.max_speed.name: Max speed
massdig.tooltip.fast_mining: Separate tool. Removes the small client pause between mined blocks.
massdig.tooltip.radius_enabled: Separate tool. Mines an area only while you hold attack with a pickaxe.
massdig.tooltip.hud: Shows a small action-bar status line while MassDig is active.
massdig.tooltip.preview: Yellow means MassDig can mine it. Blue means queued. Red means active.
massdig.tooltip.skipped_preview: Gray/orange/red marks blocks MassDig skipped, protected, or avoided.
massdig.tooltip.pause_screen: Stops the radius queue while a menu or inventory screen is open.
massdig.tooltip.mode: How aggressively MassDig finishes radius blocks.
massdig.tooltip.shape: Changes the area shape: wall, tunnel, or cube.
massdig.tooltip.match: Controls which block types are allowed into the queue.
massdig.tooltip.radius: How far from the aimed block. Maximum is 6.
massdig.tooltip.packet_limit: Lower is safer. If you get kicked for packets, lower this or use Strong guard.
massdig.tooltip.safety: Extra waiting time before finishing hard blocks.
massdig.tooltip.hard_first: Handles tough blocks earlier so deepslate is less likely to remain behind.
massdig.tooltip.auto_slowdown: If blocks do not confirm as broken, MassDig slows down temporarily.
massdig.tooltip.auto_tune: Adds wait time automatically for hard blocks and deepslate ores.
massdig.tooltip.protection: Caps packet rate and slowdown behavior in beginner-friendly levels.
massdig.tooltip.keep_within_reach: Skips blocks the server is likely to reject as too far away.
massdig.tooltip.protect_useful: Keeps containers, workstations, beds, hoppers, spawners, and similar blocks safe.
massdig.tooltip.protect_fragile: Keeps glass, torches, rails, redstone, banners, ladders, and similar blocks safe.
massdig.tooltip.player_space: Avoids breaking your feet, head space, or the block under you.
massdig.tooltip.low_health: Stops radius mining when health is low.
massdig.tooltip.reset: Returns to the recommended Mine profile.
massdig.tooltip.auto_jobs: Opens the visual planner: clear areas, quarry, tunnel, or mine an ore vein.
massdig.auto.screen.title: MassDig Auto Jobs
massdig.auto.screen.subtitle: Pick an area, preview the plan, then let MassDig work safely.
massdig.auto.type.clear_area.name: Clear area
massdig.auto.type.clear_area.hint: Clears the selected cube from top to bottom.
massdig.auto.type.quarry.name: Quarry
massdig.auto.type.quarry.hint: Clears the selected footprint downward by the chosen depth.
massdig.auto.type.tunnel.name: Tunnel
massdig.auto.type.tunnel.hint: Builds a tunnel from the aimed block using width, height, and length.
massdig.auto.type.ore_vein.name: Ore vein
massdig.auto.type.ore_vein.hint: Follows connected ore blocks of the same type.
massdig.auto.type.branch_mine.name: Branch mine
massdig.auto.type.branch_mine.hint: Makes a main tunnel with side branches at fixed intervals.
massdig.auto.type.flatten.name: Flatten land
massdig.auto.type.flatten.hint: Cuts everything above the lower selected corner.
massdig.auto.order.top_down.name: Top down
massdig.auto.order.top_down.hint: Mines high layers first, then nearby blocks.
massdig.auto.order.nearest.name: Nearest first
massdig.auto.order.nearest.hint: Always prefers blocks closest to the player.
massdig.auto.order.snake.name: Layer snake
massdig.auto.order.snake.hint: Sweeps each layer in a predictable back-and-forth route.
massdig.auto.tooltip.type: Choose the kind of automated mining job.
massdig.auto.tooltip.point_a: Aim at a block and save it as the first corner.
massdig.auto.tooltip.point_b: Aim at a block and save it as the opposite corner.
massdig.auto.tooltip.preview: Builds the block plan and highlights it in the world.
massdig.auto.tooltip.keep_ores: Leaves ore blocks untouched while clearing or quarrying.
massdig.auto.tooltip.expand: Grows the selected box by one block in every direction.
massdig.auto.tooltip.shrink: Shrinks the selected box by one block from every side.
massdig.auto.tooltip.width: Tunnel width, or a helper size for generated jobs.
massdig.auto.tooltip.length: Tunnel length from the aimed block.
massdig.auto.tooltip.depth: How far a quarry digs downward.
massdig.auto.tooltip.branch_spacing: How often branch tunnels start from the main tunnel.
massdig.auto.tooltip.branch_length: How far each side branch goes.
massdig.auto.tooltip.use_look: Uses the block under your crosshair as the job start.
massdig.auto.tooltip.tool_switch: Switches to the best hotbar tool for the current block.
massdig.auto.tooltip.durability: Tools at or below this durability are skipped.
massdig.auto.tooltip.no_tool: Pauses when no safe matching tool is available.
massdig.auto.tooltip.inventory: Pauses when the inventory has no free slot.
massdig.auto.tooltip.autopilot: Experimental: walks toward the next reachable work area. Turn off on servers if unsure.
massdig.auto.tooltip.both_branches: Branch mine digs left and right side tunnels instead of only one side.
massdig.auto.tooltip.order: Changes how AutoDig sorts the plan before mining.
massdig.auto.tooltip.start_pause: Starts the current plan or pauses the running job.
massdig.auto.tooltip.stop: Stops and clears the current AutoDig job.
massdig.auto.tooltip.layer: Moves the mini-map and strong preview highlight to another Y layer.
massdig.auto.tooltip.move_y: Moves the whole selected area up or down.
massdig.hub.title: MassDig
massdig.hub.subtitle: Choose a mode. Each mode works separately and does not depend on the others.
massdig.hub.fast.title: Fast Digging
massdig.hub.fast.line1: Removes the client delay between blocks.
massdig.hub.fast.line2: Does not radius-mine or run AutoDig.
massdig.hub.radius.title: Radius Drill
massdig.hub.radius.line1: Hold attack with a pickaxe to mine nearby blocks.
massdig.hub.radius.line2: Radius is capped at 6 with server guards.
massdig.hub.auto.title: AutoDig
massdig.hub.auto.line1: Separate mode for quarries, tunnels, and areas.
massdig.hub.auto.line2: Builds a plan first, then runs the job.
massdig.hub.guide_tooltip: Shows a short guide for MassDig modes.
massdig.hub.safe_profile_tooltip: Applies careful settings for servers and stricter anti-cheats.
massdig.radius.screen.title: Radius Drill
massdig.radius.screen.subtitle: This mode only runs while attack is held and a pickaxe is in your hand.
massdig.radius.tooltip.advanced: Shows or hides technical drill settings.
massdig.guide.title: MassDig Guide
massdig.guide.subtitle: Short version: which mode to use and what it does.
massdig.guide.choose.title: What to choose?
massdig.guide.choose.1: Mine one block after another faster: Fast Digging.
massdig.guide.choose.2: Break a wall around the crosshair: Radius Drill.
massdig.guide.choose.3: Clear an area or quarry: AutoDig.
massdig.guide.fast.title: Fast Digging
massdig.guide.fast.1: Only removes the client mining pause.
massdig.guide.fast.2: Does not touch radius, queue, or job plans.
massdig.guide.fast.3: Can be enabled with other modes.
massdig.guide.radius.title: Radius Drill
massdig.guide.radius.1: Hold attack with a pickaxe and aim at a block.
massdig.guide.radius.2: Yellow target, blue queue, red active.
massdig.guide.radius.3: Similar blocks helps stone and deepslate mixes.
massdig.guide.auto.title: AutoDig
massdig.guide.auto.1: A separate planner for bigger jobs.
massdig.guide.auto.2: Choose job type, points/size, then build a plan.
massdig.guide.auto.3: Start only when the preview looks right.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.massdig: Fast digging, smart radius drilling, block protection, previews, profiles, and server-aware packet pacing.
